intended_use: The TipTraQ is a wearable device intended for aiding in sleep apnea evaluation/diagnosis for adult patients suspected of sleep apnea in both home-based and clinical-use environments.
intended_use_full: The TipTraQ is a wearable device intended for aiding in sleep apnea evaluation/diagnosis for adult patients suspected of sleep apnea in both home-based and clinical-use environments.
ground_truth: polysomnography (PSG) gold standard for sleep validation; arterial blood gas sampling for SpO2 validation
other_metrics: SpO2 Arms error: 1.41 (range 70-100%); Pulse Rate Arms: 1.64 (range 56-118 bpm); Pearson Correlation Coefficient for Total Sleep Time: 0.786
